generated_oml:
namespace DTDFVocab = "http://example.org/dtdf"
namespace base = "http://www.w3.org/2002/07/owl#"
instance PositionSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Sensor measuring position of the gantry crane",
    DTDFVocab:producedData CraneStateDataTransmitted
]

instance VelocitySensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Sensor measuring velocity of the gantry crane",
    DTDFVocab:producedData CraneStateDataTransmitted
]

instance CraneStateDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom PositionSensor, VelocitySensor
]

instance SystemPerformanceTrackingInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insight derived from historical data for system performance analysis"
]

instance RealTimeMonitoringInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time visualization of crane operation status"
]

instance PredictedCraneBehaviorInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Prediction of future crane behavior based on current data"
]

instance ModelAccuracyInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insight into model accuracy compared to physical system data"
]

instance FaultDiagnosisInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Diagnosis of system anomalies and faults"
]

instance OptimalControlAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Automatic control commands for optimal crane operation",
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance SimulationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service for predicting crane behavior using real-time sensor data",
    DTDFVocab:provides PredictedCraneBehaviorInsight
]

instance HistoricalDataLoggingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service for logging historical crane operation data for performance tracking",
    DTDFVocab:provides SystemPerformanceTrackingInsight
]

instance DataVisualizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service providing real-time monitoring via data visualization",
    DTDFVocab:provides RealTimeMonitoringInsight
]

instance OptimalControlService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service providing optimal control for crane operations",
    DTDFVocab:provides OptimalControlAction
]

instance ContinuousValidationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service ensuring model accuracy through continuous comparison with physical data",
    DTDFVocab:provides ModelAccuracyInsight
]

instance FaultDetectionService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service for identifying and diagnosing system anomalies",
    DTDFVocab:provides FaultDiagnosisInsight
]

instance GantryLib : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Python-based module for managing gantry crane system components",
    DTDFVocab:enables SimulationService, ContinuousValidationService, FaultDetectionService, OptimalControlService
]

instance TimescaleDB : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Time-series database for storing crane operation data",
    DTDFVocab:enables HistoricalDataLoggingService
]

instance MosquittoMQTTBroker : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MQTT broker for real-time messaging between physical and virtual components",
    DTDFVocab:enables DataVisualizationService
]

instance GrafanaDashboard : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Data visualization dashboard for real-time monitoring",
    DTDFVocab:enables DataVisualizationService
]

instance CADModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Geometric representation of gantry crane structure",
    DTDFVocab:inputTo GantryLib
]

instance KinematicModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Dynamic motion simulation model for gantry crane",
    DTDFVocab:inputTo GantryLib
]

instance CraneStateData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Time-series data of crane position and velocity",
    DTDFVocab:fromData CraneStateDataTransmitted,
    DTDFVocab:inputTo TimescaleDB
]

instance PhysicalCraneStructure : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Physical structure of the lab-scale gantry crane"
]

instance CraneController : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Controller unit for the physical gantry crane system"
]

instance GantryCraneEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:contains PhysicalCraneStructure, CraneController
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "Control commands for crane movement are generated by the Trajectory Generator Service and processed by the Control Application, which sends them to the Physical Crane Interface. The Continuous Validation Service compares executed trajectory measurements against simulations; discrepancies exceeding thresholds trigger operator notifications via the Dashboard. Specific command types, message formats, authentication mechanisms, feedback systems, conflict resolution, and command execution confirmation details are not provided in the document."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "The system utilizes the C4 Model for architectural description, featuring a context diagram (Figure 2) and six container components: Database for data storage, Dashboard for runtime visualization, Trajectory Generator Service for path planning, Simulation Service for predictive modeling, Continuous Validation Service for real-time validation, and MQTT Broker for inter-service communication via publish-subscribe messaging."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "The system employs MQTT for inter-service communication between containers such as the Trajectory Generator, Simulation, and Control Applications. TimescaleDB is used for data storage. Network topology, bandwidth, latency requirements, reliability mechanisms, and security protocols are not detailed in the document."
]

instance dt_hosting_deployment : DTDFVocab:Deployment [
    base:desc "Deployed on a personal computer (on-premise) with Database, MQTT Broker, and Dashboard containers containerized using Docker. Python components are bundled into the gantrylib module and installed via pip. Computational and storage requirements, scalability mechanisms, and availability/reliability details beyond the described setup are not specified."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "The Air Quality Management exemplar complies with the AutomationML standard for digital twin modeling, as indicated in the documentation. Other exemplars do not reference adherence to specific industry standards, utilizing ad-hoc approaches instead."
]
